displayTitle: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Rogue Agents #3
synopsis: As the Bad Batch closes in on the scientist they’ve been searching for, their adversaries make a tempting offer. Is it too good to be true? Meanwhile, another deadly (and all too familiar) enemy trains their sights on Clone Force 99... • The team that brought you the hit comics miniseries Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Ghost Agents returns with this thrilling follow-up series! • Four-issue series.
title: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Rogue Agents #3
